hook.text: SATURDAY'S WORLD CUP: WE CALL IT

caption: Saturday's calls: Casemiro's Brazil don't lose the United derby to Mazraoui's Morocco, Haiti keep Fletcher's Scotland tight, and the Swiss are the banker. Who you got? 🔴⚽
